summary: AgentForge AI Software Factory - Full testing of Pipeline, God Mode V2, Memory System, Settings APIs and Frontend UI. All 19 backend tests passed. All 6 frontend pages load correctly with proper functionality.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/pipeline/agents - Returns all 10 specialist agents (DIRECTOR, ATLAS, PIXEL, NEXUS, TITAN, SYNAPSE, DEPLOY, SENTINEL, PHOENIX, PROBE)
✅ POST /api/pipeline/create (game) - Creates game build pipeline with phases

✅ GET /api/local-bridge/download - Local bridge download endpoint exists
✅ Frontend: Landing page loads with 6 agents displayed

critical_code_review_comments: All 10 specialist agents properly defined in /app/backend/routes/pipeline.py with prompts, roles, specializations, and colors
God Mode V2 streaming endpoint properly handles SSE with iteration-based builds
Memory system properly stores build history and agent performance metrics
Local bridge integration buttons properly conditional on file availability
Command Center UI correctly displays all 10 agents in the left sidebar with color-coded icons
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test project ID 62d21bbb-119c-4938-91ba-5d796d8aa0fd
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full testing of AgentForge AI Software Factory complete. Backend APIs for pipeline (10 specialist agents), God Mode V2 (streaming recursive build), memory system (stats, recommendations, agent performance), settings, and local bridge all working. Frontend Command Center shows all 10 agents (DIRECTOR, ATLAS, PIXEL, NEXUS, TITAN, SYNAPSE, DEPLOY, SENTINEL, PHOENIX, PROBE) with recursive loop progress (4 iterations: Functional Build, Improved UX, Optimized Performance, Production Polish). God Mode page has PUSH TO LOCAL and LOCAL BUILD buttons for Unreal Engine integration. All routes properly mounted via include_router in server.py.
